name: border-editor
description: Utility for editing border properties with live preview - v1.0.1 with improved UI using admin-tabs
author: Spwig

1.0.1: Always show 4 width inputs with link/unlink for sync behavior
Always show 4 radius inputs with link/unlink for sync behavior
Removed duplicate color picker trigger button
Fixed toggleLink to not recreate UI (eliminates flicker)
Added min-height to preview container with white background
Converted footer buttons to icon-only with tooltips
Custom SVG icons for corner shapes and radius presets
Improved CSS string parsing for page builder integration
Live preview updates and computed style detection
Auto-unlink when editing individual corners in advanced tab
Fixed corner-shape persistence when switching between shapes
Made preview rectangular (2:1 ratio) for better visual distinction
Fixed color picker closing border editor popup issue
Improved overall UI consistency with admin design patterns
1.0.0: Border style, width, color, and radius controls
